top_signals.title: S&P 500, Tech Stocks Slip With All Eyes on SpaceX, Iran Hopes
top_signals.summary: US stocks reversed early gains as investors awaited pending trading in SpaceX, which made history with the biggest-ever IPO, and assessed the potential for an interim peace deal in the Iran conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gensler Says Kalshi Is Flat Wrong: Sports Bets Aren’t Swaps
top_signals.summary: Gary Gensler, overseer of Wall Street for significant parts of the last two decades, has a message for anyone arguing sports betting is a matter for federal financial regulators: They’re wrong.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Canada Post to end door-to-door delivery for 620K addresses by 2027
top_signals.summary:
Canada Post announced it plans to transition nearly 500,000 more people to centralized community mailboxes because home delivery is too expensive.

The post Canada Post to end door-to-door delivery for 620K addresses by 2027 appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Faster Labor Contracts Act passed the House
top_signals.summary:
H.R. 5408 gives employers 120 days to reach a first union contract or a government arbitrator writes one for them. The House passed it 230-193 on June 9. The Senate is the last wall. If you run trucks, this is not someone else's problem.

The post The Faster Labor Contracts Act passed the House appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BlackRock private credit fund honours less than 40% of redemption requests
top_signals.summary: The firm’s $13bn HPS Corporate Lending Fund limits withdrawals for a second consecutive quarter

top_signals.title: How America Lost Command of the Commons
top_signals.summary: The oceans may soon be tolled.
